matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profilemanagement-009 title: validate profile fields and discard changes with multiple discards module: profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in test data: incomplete profile fields test steps: 1. click 'profile' in the sidebar menu 2. verify that the profile page is displayed 3. click on the blue house icon 4. verify that the dwellings screen is displayed 5. verify that the fields are incomplete 6. correct the fields 7. click 'discard changes' 8. verify that the changes are discarded 9. verify that the fields are still incomplete 10. try to save changes without further corrections 11. verify that the validation fails and user is prompted to correct the fields 12. correct the fields again 13. click 'discard changes' 14. verify that the changes are discarded 15. verify that the fields are still incomplete 16. try to save changes without further corrections 17. verify that the validation fails and user is prompted to correct the fields 18. correct the fields again 19. click 'discard changes' 20. verify that the changes are discarded 21. verify that the fields are still incomplete expected result: changes are discarded successfully after multiple discards.
